description_long: This is a single slice of a muffin with a golden-brown, slightly crumbly exterior and a moist, dense interior. The muffin is studded with visible inclusions, likely pieces of fruit or chocolate, and has a slightly uneven, rustic top with a sugary crust. The surface appears to have a light, glossy sheen in some areas, suggesting a sugary glaze or melted sugar. The interior is pale yellow with pockets of darker material, possibly berries or chocolate chips, and a few air pockets indicating a soft, cake-like texture. The slice is placed upright on a textured white paper napkin, with some crumbs and small pieces scattered around its base. There is no visible wrapper or additional decorative elements beyond the natural topping.
description: A thick, rustic slice of muffin with a golden-brown crust, visible inclusions, and a moist, pale interior, resting on a white paper napkin. The top is slightly glossy and uneven, with a sugary crust and scattered crumbs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the muffin's height, golden crust, and some inclusions near the edge, with the napkin base visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the moist, pale interior with several inclusions and a glossy, uneven top crust.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the thick, golden-brown crust and a prominent dark inclusion near the middle.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the broad, pale interior with fewer inclusions and a slightly rough, sugary top.
attribute_topping_type: sugar crust, fruit or chocolate inclusions
